goal: Remove confusing decks Back button + close tracking gaps (card-page orientation toggle, See-all, share-page copy-link, gate copy-link)
done: (UX) Removed the .decks-top-row__back arrow — Decks is reachable 3 ways (home/profile/nav) so a back that always went to /profile was misleading. (Tracking) common.js delegated listener now also fires orientation_toggled on card-page [data-orientation] taps (re-render w/o reload, so meaning_viewed wouldn't re-fire) and cta_clicked{see_all_decks} for the home See-all; share.js copyShareLink fires share_clicked{copy_link}; sign-in gate in-app copy-link fires a popup event.
verified: chrome harness: decks page 0 back buttons + header still clean; orientation_toggled{card_id:the-fool,orientation:reversed} on toggle; cta_clicked{see_all_decks,location:home}; all into dataLayer w/ gtm.uniqueEventId. node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
